attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WDQ.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY,
WDQ.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
WDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
WDQ.BK_DEAL_CONCESSION_SOURCE_NUM,
WDQ.CONCESSION_PERCENT,
WDQ.CONCESSION_USD_AMT,
WDQ.CONCESSION_EXPIRATION_DT,
WDQ.DISCOUNT_NAME,
WDQ.REQUESTED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUN,
WDQ.APPROVED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT,
WDQ.ADJUSTMENT_PRICE_AMT,
WDQ.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
WDQ.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME,
WDQ.APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
WDQ.SK_CONCESSION_OBJECT_ID_INT,
WDQ.RU_BK_REBATE_TRX_TYPE_CD,
WDQ.RU_BK_REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CD,
WDQ.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WDQ.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WDQ.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WDQ.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WDQ.BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME,
WDQ.CONCESSION_APPLIED_FLG,
WDQ.MANUALLY_APPLIED_DISCOUNT_FLG,
WDQ.PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
WDQ.SRC_RPTD_CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
WDQ.SRC_RPTD_PROMOTION_REV_NUM,
WDQ.DISCOUNT_METHOD_CD,
WDQ.SRC_RPTD_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_AMT,
WDQ.DV_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_PCT,
WDQ.DV_DSCNT_PERQTY_LMPSUM_USD_AMT,
WDQ.ADJUSTED_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDQ.SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
WDQ.DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,
WDQ.SRC_CREATION_DTM,
WDQ.DV_SRC_CREATION_DT,
WDQ.SS_CODE,
WDQ.INSTANCE_ID,
WDQ.ROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
WDQ.UNROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION_RNWL WDQ
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC
				WHERE WDQ.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY=NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY)
